prompt: Create a high-quality square RPG character card based on the reference image. If the reference is a photo, reflect the facial features, hairstyle, expression, atmosphere, and accessories. If it's an illustration, use the design, colors, and pose as a reference to reconstruct it as an original RPG character rather than a perfect reproduction. Place a 22-year-old adult Japanese female RPG character in the center, based on the reference. Include semi-long black hair, rose decorations, an elegant model-like physique, and a calm, confident expression for a sophisticated look. Include a customizable Japanese profile UI within the card. Name: REINA Title: The one clad in quiet brilliance
